project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.Beskar.CodeAnalytics.Dashboard: http (1).executor": "Debug", ".NET Project.Beskar.CodeAnalytics.Collector.Console.executor": "Debug", ".NET Project.Beskar.CodeAnalytics.Experiments.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "list.type.of.created.stylesheet": "CSS", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "CodeLensConfigurable", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: Default task
Fix ambigous error
Syntax token themeing
More logic for source tokenizing
Start of syntax discovery writer
Remvoe unused files
Integrate `SyntaxDiscoveryFileWriter`, implement serialization/deserialization for `SyntaxFile`, and update dependencies.
Add `SyntaxFileReader` implementation with deserialization logic and integrate into experiments.
Add `SymbolLocationSpec` with location tracking and integrate into discovery, tokenization, and sorting logic.
Add `LinePreviewWriter` and `LinePreviewView` for preview serialization and integrate into tokenization and sorting logic.
Refactor folder discovery logic and integrate `ProjectToFolder` and `FolderToFolder` edges into discovery process.
Introduce metadata system with `DatabaseDescriptor`, `StructureDescriptor`, and readers for folder and spec management. Integrate folder indexing and sorting logic.
Add `DatabaseBuilder` and `DatabaseStructureBuilder` for constructing metadata. Simplify `SpecDescriptor` by removing unused properties.
Add `StructureDescriptorSerializer` and `DatabaseDescriptorSerializer` for serialization. Extend `DatabaseBuilder` usage across baking and folder discovery. Simplify `SpecDescriptor`.

Add more spec descriptors and serializers (`FileSpec`, `ProjectSpec`, `SolutionSpec`, `SymbolLocationSpec`, `SyntaxFile`). Extend `DatabaseStructureBuilder` and `StructureDescriptor` for comprehensive metadata handling.

Add symbol spec descriptors and serializers (`SymbolSpec`, `TypeSymbolSpec`, `NamedTypeSymbolSpec`, `FieldSymbolSpec`, `PropertySymbolSpec`, `ParameterSymbolSpec`, `MethodSymbolSpec`, `TypeParameterSymbolSpec`, `SymbolEdgeSpec`). Extend `DatabaseBuilder`, `DatabaseDescriptor`, and `Serialization`. Integrate edge spec handling and initialize logic for descriptors.
Introduce `FolderConnector` for folder edge connection logic, add `Dispose` implementations to descriptors, and extend `EdgeConnectionBakeStep` with folder support.

Extend index handling by introducing serializers (`NGramIndexDescriptorSerializer`, `BTreeIndexDescriptorSerializer`), enhancing `IndexBakeStep`, and adding index management to descriptors and builders.
Replace `Flags` structures with `PackedBools` utility, refactor flag handling across entities, and drop unused `Flags.cs`.

Add `GetTargetIds` methods to `SymbolEdgeSpecDescriptor` for retrieving target IDs by type or source, refactor `ProjectDiscovery` to manage root folders, and extend `SpecFileReader` with `ItemCount` and binary search functionality.
Introduce Blazor WebAssembly dashboard project with Razor components, client-server structure, routing, and base styles.
Restructure and update Blazor dashboard with consolidated Razor components, refined routing, navigation enhancements, modernized styles, and standardized project settings.
Add GitHub link with icon to NavBar and integrate `Beskar.Blazor.Icons` package.
Introduce vertical resizable container and pane components with corresponding styles and JavaScript logic. Integrate into `SourceExplorer` for nested vertical resizing functionality.

Introduce shared project for Blazor dashboard with models, options, services, and interfaces. Add `StringPoolDescriptor`, extend `DatabaseDescriptor` and `DatabaseBuilder` for string pool handling, and implement folder structure services. Refactor `FileDiscovery` and `SpecFileReader` to support string-based file and folder names. Update dependencies and project references.
Add folder tree components with hierarchical display for source structure, integrate `DatabaseScheduler` for efficient async operations, and update `SourceExplorer` with folder tree functionality.
Enhance folder tree component styling with scrollable content area, improve layout consistency, and adjust spacing in node elements.
Add `TokenTextViewer` component for syntax highlighting, integrate file opening logic in `FolderTree`, and enhance `SourceExplorer` with file viewing functionality.
Adjust `TokenTextViewer` styling for improved layout and scrolling, refine `SourceExplorer` structure with nested styling updates.
Fix constant priority calculation

Add serializers for `StorageDescriptor` and `StorageFileDescriptor`, implement `DateTimeOffsetSerializer`, extend `IndexBakeStep` functionality, and register storage-related serializers in `Serialization`.
Refactor index-building process to return detailed `IndexBuildResult`, update index builders, and enhance `IndexBakeStep` with storage metadata integration.
Integrate storage metadata handling in file writers, enhance serialization logic, and refactor `SyntaxDiscoveryFileWriter` and `StringFileWriter` with item count and byte tracking updates.
Add `LinePreviewWriter` improvements with buffered streaming, refactor write logic, and extend `StorageFileKind` with `LinePreviews`.
Refactor `LinePreviewWriter` to support `DatabaseBuilder`, optimize line caching in `SourceTokenizer`, and track item/byte counts for storage metadata integration.
Add `LocationService` and integrate token click handling in `SourceExplorer` for symbol location tracking
Introduce `LinePreviewsDescriptor` and related serializers, integrate `LinePreviewReader` for efficient symbol location previews, and enhance storage metadata handling with line preview support.
Introduce `LocationViewer` component and enhance symbol navigation with location previews and click handling.
Add `FileSpec` property to `TokenLocationModel` and enhance `LocationService` to include file metadata alongside location previews.

Add grouped file-based layout to `LocationViewer` with collapsible headers and enhanced preview formatting. Refactor `TokenLocationModel` and `LocationService` for file-path-based grouping and metadata inclusion.
Enhance symbol navigation with token highlights, expand folder navigation capabilities, and add `TokenIndex` tracking to `SymbolLocationSpec` for improved location handling.
Implement smooth scrolling for token highlights, enhance folder and source navigation with JavaScript integration, and optimize `LocationService` file lookup logic.
Introduce `SymbolCard` and `NamedTypeCard` components, add `ISymbolService` with symbol retrieval methods, and enhance `SourceExplorer` with dynamic symbol visualization.

Add `SymbolTypeTag` and improve `NamedTypeCard` visualization with color-coded headers, dependency graph links, and better structured layouts. Introduce `ColorUtils` for dynamic symbol styling and enhance `LocationViewer` with symbol count display.

Add `SymbolTypeTag` to various symbol cards (`MethodCard`, `TypeCard`, `PropertyCard`, etc.) with color-coded headers, dependency graph links, and improved layouts. Extend `SymbolCard` logic for dynamic symbol views.

MESSAGE.value: Introduce Blazor WebAssembly dashboard project with Razor components, client-server structure, routing, and base styles.
Restructure and update Blazor dashboard with consolidated Razor components, refined routing, navigation enhancements, modernized styles, and standardized project settings.
Add GitHub link with icon to NavBar and integrate `Beskar.Blazor.Icons` package.
Introduce vertical resizable container and pane components with corresponding styles and JavaScript logic. Integrate into `SourceExplorer` for nested vertical resizing functionality.

Introduce shared project for Blazor dashboard with models, options, services, and interfaces. Add `StringPoolDescriptor`, extend `DatabaseDescriptor` and `DatabaseBuilder` for string pool handling, and implement folder structure services. Refactor `FileDiscovery` and `SpecFileReader` to support string-based file and folder names. Update dependencies and project references.
Add folder tree components with hierarchical display for source structure, integrate `DatabaseScheduler` for efficient async operations, and update `SourceExplorer` with folder tree functionality.
Enhance folder tree component styling with scrollable content area, improve layout consistency, and adjust spacing in node elements.
Add `TokenTextViewer` component for syntax highlighting, integrate file opening logic in `FolderTree`, and enhance `SourceExplorer` with file viewing functionality.
Adjust `TokenTextViewer` styling for improved layout and scrolling, refine `SourceExplorer` structure with nested styling updates.
Fix constant priority calculation

Add serializers for `StorageDescriptor` and `StorageFileDescriptor`, implement `DateTimeOffsetSerializer`, extend `IndexBakeStep` functionality, and register storage-related serializers in `Serialization`.
Refactor index-building process to return detailed `IndexBuildResult`, update index builders, and enhance `IndexBakeStep` with storage metadata integration.
Integrate storage metadata handling in file writers, enhance serialization logic, and refactor `SyntaxDiscoveryFileWriter` and `StringFileWriter` with item count and byte tracking updates.
Add `LinePreviewWriter` improvements with buffered streaming, refactor write logic, and extend `StorageFileKind` with `LinePreviews`.
Refactor `LinePreviewWriter` to support `DatabaseBuilder`, optimize line caching in `SourceTokenizer`, and track item/byte counts for storage metadata integration.
Add `LocationService` and integrate token click handling in `SourceExplorer` for symbol location tracking
Introduce `LinePreviewsDescriptor` and related serializers, integrate `LinePreviewReader` for efficient symbol location previews, and enhance storage metadata handling with line preview support.
Introduce `LocationViewer` component and enhance symbol navigation with location previews and click handling.
Add `FileSpec` property to `TokenLocationModel` and enhance `LocationService` to include file metadata alongside location previews.

Add grouped file-based layout to `LocationViewer` with collapsible headers and enhanced preview formatting. Refactor `TokenLocationModel` and `LocationService` for file-path-based grouping and metadata inclusion.
Enhance symbol navigation with token highlights, expand folder navigation capabilities, and add `TokenIndex` tracking to `SymbolLocationSpec` for improved location handling.
Implement smooth scrolling for token highlights, enhance folder and source navigation with JavaScript integration, and optimize `LocationService` file lookup logic.
Introduce `SymbolCard` and `NamedTypeCard` components, add `ISymbolService` with symbol retrieval methods, and enhance `SourceExplorer` with dynamic symbol visualization.

Add `SymbolTypeTag` and improve `NamedTypeCard` visualization with color-coded headers, dependency graph links, and better structured layouts. Introduce `ColorUtils` for dynamic symbol styling and enhance `LocationViewer` with symbol count display.

Add `SymbolTypeTag` to various symbol cards (`MethodCard`, `TypeCard`, `PropertyCard`, etc.) with color-coded headers, dependency graph links, and improved layouts. Extend `SymbolCard` logic for dynamic symbol views.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add `SymbolTypeTag` to various symbol cards (`MethodCard`, `TypeCard`, `PropertyCard`, etc.) with color-coded headers, dependency graph links, and improved layouts. Extend `SymbolCard` logic for dynamic symbol views.
